hero.title: Expert Skin Care,
hero.description: Get a personalized diagnosis from certified dermatologists within 24 hours. No appointments, no waiting rooms — just professional care delivered to you.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Professional Care in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.description: Skip the waiting room and get expert skin care from the comfort of your home.

step1.title: Upload Photos
step1.description: Take clear photos of the affected skin area and describe your symptoms using our guided questionnaire.

step2.title: Expert Review
step2.description: Our certified dermatologists carefully analyze your case and create a personalized diagnosis within 24 hours.

step3.title: Get Treatment
step3.description: Receive your diagnosis with a detailed treatment plan. Prescriptions are sent directly to your pharmacy if needed.

conditions.label: What We Treat
conditions.title: Expert Care for All Skin Conditions
conditions.description: Our board-certified dermatologists specialize in diagnosing and treating a wide range of skin, hair, and nail conditions. Whether it's a minor concern or a chronic condition, we're here to help.

acne.name: Acne
acne.description: Pimples, blackheads, and cysts affecting face and body

eczema.name: Eczema
eczema.description: Itchy, inflamed patches that can appear anywhere

psoriasis.name: Psoriasis
psoriasis.description: Red, scaly patches often on elbows, knees, and scalp

rosacea.name: Rosacea
rosacea.description: Facial redness and visible blood vessels

skinRashes.name: Skin Rashes
skinRashes.description: Unexplained irritation, redness, or allergic reactions

hairLoss.name: Hair Loss
hairLoss.description: Thinning hair or bald patches on scalp

pricing.label: Pricing Plans
pricing.title: Choose Your Care Level
pricing.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Select the plan that best fits your needs.
pricing.note: *Price of medication not included. Many health insurance plans reimburse telemedicine consultations — check with your provider for coverage details.

standard.name: Standard Request
standard.description: A skin concern has recently appeared and you want a professional assessment and recommendation? This is the right option for you!

urgent.name: Urgent Request
urgent.description: Need an urgent assessment of your skin concerns? Waiting is not an option? Get a response from a skin specialist within 24 hours on weekdays — and even on weekends!

expert.name: Expert Treatment
expert.description: Have a persistent skin problem where treatment hasn't worked? Our specialists will take care of your issue and create an individualized treatment plan.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our telemedicine service.

q1.question: How does the online consultation work?
q1.answer: It's simple! Upload photos of your skin concern, answer a few questions about your symptoms and medical history, and our dermatologists will review your case. You'll receive a detailed diagnosis and treatment plan within 24 hours via the app.

q2.question: Who are the dermatologists?
q2.answer: All our dermatologists are board-certified specialists with years of clinical experience. They are licensed physicians who have completed specialized training in dermatology and are authorized to diagnose and prescribe treatments.

q3.question: Can you prescribe medication?
q3.answer: Yes, if our dermatologists determine that prescription medication is necessary for your treatment, they can issue a prescription. This will be sent directly to your preferred pharmacy for pickup or delivery.

q4.question: Is my data secure?
q4.answer: Absolutely. We take your privacy seriously. All data is encrypted and stored in compliance with GDPR and medical data protection regulations. Your information is only accessible to the treating dermatologist and is never shared with third parties.

q5.question: What conditions can be treated online?
q5.answer: We treat a wide range of skin conditions including acne, eczema, psoriasis, rosacea, rashes, fungal infections, hair loss, and more. For conditions that require physical examination or procedures, we'll recommend an in-person visit.

q6.question: How long does it take to get a response?
q6.answer: Most cases receive a diagnosis within 24 hours during weekdays. Urgent cases may be prioritized. You'll receive a notification as soon as your dermatologist has reviewed your case.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Have Questions? Contact Us
contact.description: Our team is here to help. Send us a message and we'll respond within 24 hours.

toast.title: Message sent!
toast.description: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

cta.title: Take the First Step Towards Healthier Skin
cta.description: Join thousands of patients who've discovered convenient, professional dermatology care from home.

reviews.title: What Our Patients Say
reviews.description: Over 10,000 satisfied patients trust Telederm for their skin health

r1.name: Sarah M.
r1.text: Quick and professional diagnosis! Within a few hours I had a response and the right medication. Highly recommended!

r2.name: Thomas K.
r2.text: Finally no more long waiting times at the dermatologist. The app is super easy to use and the doctors are very competent.

r3.name: Lisa B.
r3.text: Had a stubborn eczema and immediately got the right treatment. After a week everything was gone. Thanks Telederm!

r4.name: Michael R.
r4.text: Very good service. Uploading the photos was easy and the diagnosis came faster than expected. Would use it again.

r5.name: Anna S.
r5.text: Perfect for working professionals! I could do everything from home without having to take a day off.

r6.name: David W.
r6.text: The dermatologists are truly experts in their field. I felt well taken care of and the treatment worked immediately.

r7.name: Katharina H.
r7.text: My rosacea was finally properly diagnosed. The treatment plan is very detailed and helpful. Absolute recommendation!

r8.name: Johannes L.
r8.text: Straightforward and effective. The doctors take their time and explain everything clearly. Better than any office visit.

r9.name: Patricia M.
r9.text: Had concerns about online diagnosis, but was pleasantly surprised. Very thorough and professional!

r10.name: Christian B.
r10.text: Super fast help with my psoriasis. The prescription was sent directly to my pharmacy. Top service!

r11.name: Nina F.
r11.text: As a working mother, I don't have time for long doctor visits. Telederm is the perfect solution for me.

r12.name: Henrik S.
r12.text: I'm thrilled with the quality of the consultation. The dermatologists are competent and friendly. Happy to use again!

r13.name: Elena K.
r13.text: My acne has significantly improved thanks to the prescribed treatment. Many thanks to the Telederm team!

r14.name: Felix D.
r14.text: Simple process, quick response, effective treatment. What more could you want? 5 stars deserved!

r15.name: Rita W.
r15.text: The data security convinced me. Everything GDPR compliant and very discreet. I feel well taken care of.

r16.name: Benjamin A.
r16.text: Had a stubborn rash. Within 24 hours I had a diagnosis and the right medication.

r17.name: Vanessa P.
r17.text: The app is intuitive and the whole process is very pleasant. Will definitely recommend Telederm.

r18.name: Georg N.
r18.text: First-class service! The doctors address individual questions and the follow-up care is also great.

doctors.label: Our Medical Team
doctors.title: Experienced Dermatologists for Your Skin
doctors.description: All our doctors are licensed dermatology specialists with years of experience in treating skin conditions

paragraphs.p1: Telederm was founded in 2020 with a clear vision: To provide everyone with quick and easy access to qualified dermatological care.
paragraphs.p2: Long waiting times for dermatologist appointments are a problem we wanted to solve. With our team of experienced dermatologists and state-of-the-art telemedicine technology, we offer a fast, secure, and professional alternative.
paragraphs.p3: Today, over 50,000 patients trust us with their skin health. Our medical team consists of more than 20 licensed dermatology specialists who are here for you with passion and expertise.

patientCentered.title: Patient-Centered
patientCentered.description: Your health is our top priority

privacy.title: Data Privacy
privacy.description: Highest standards for your personal data

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.quote: "We believe that everyone deserves access to first-class dermatological care — fast, easy, and from anywhere. With Telederm, we're making this dream a reality."
